data.description: SMOKING UP, DRINKING DOWN Tobacco and smoking products jumped 2.1% — the biggest rise since 2017 — while at-home alcohol fell 0.4%, the sharpest drop since 2019.

data.title: Expedia CFO sees dynamic economy, lowers margin expectations. Revenue up 11% to $3.55 billion, stock drops 7%.
data.description: Expedia Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: EXPE) experienced a decrease in stock price despite reporting impressive fourth-quarter results. The company surpassed expectations with revenue increasing by 11% year over year to $3.55 billion, beating the estimated $3.419 billion. Adjusted EBITDA also rose by 32% year over year to $848, with EBITDA margin expanding by 368 bps year over year to 23.9% in Q4. Additionally, adjusted EPS saw a significant surge of 58% year over year to $3.78, exceeding the projected $3.33. Expedia also displayed strong performance by posting double-digit booking growth, enhancing its dividend, and repurchasing $1.7 billion in stock. However, despite these positive outcomes, the stock faced a nearly 7% decline in premarket trading as cautious guidance for 2026 indicated a more reserved outlook. For more details, refer to the full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Intensity Therapeutics will undergo a reverse stock split, with trading expected to start on Feb. 19, 2026, under the Nasdaq symbol INTS.
data.description: Intensity Therapeutics, Inc. is a late-stage clinical biotechnology company that will see its common stock start trading on a post-split adjusted basis from February 19, 2026. The company, listed as Nasdaq: INTS, is based in SHELTON, Conn. This development marks a significant step for the company as it continues to progress in its field.

data.title: Coreforce on GovTech 100 list for innovative companies in public sector; recognized for public safety tech.
data.description: Atlanta-based public safety technology provider, Coreforce, has recently been recognized by GovTech for its innovative contributions to the public sector. The company has been included in the prestigious GovTech 100 list, which showcases leading companies that are driving advancements in government technology. Coreforce's inclusion in this list highlights its significant impact and achievements in improving public safety.

data.title: Bogota Financial Corp. reports net income of $680,000 for Q4 2025, $2.1 million for full year 2025, compared to losses in 2024.
data.description: Teaneck, New Jersey, on February 13, 2026 - Bogota Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: BSBK) announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. The company, which serves as the holding entity for Bogota Savings Bank, revealed a net income of $680,000 or $0.05 per basic and diluted share for the last quarter of 2025. This signifies a positive shift from the same period in the previous year, which incurred a net loss of $930,000 or $0.07 per basic and diluted share. For the entirety of 2025, Bogota Financial Corp. reported net income amounting to $2.1 million or $0.17 per basic and diluted share. This marks a notable improvement from the prior year's net loss of $2.2 million, equivalent to $0.17 per basic and diluted share.

data.title: Three individuals have been arrested in France for breaking into the home of a Binance executive.
data.description: Three individuals were apprehended by French authorities in connection to a burglary aimed at a top official of Binance in France, as per RTL. Binance has verified that one of its employees was the victim of a house intrusion.

data.title: Core CPI inflation rate drops to near 5-year low, lowest since early 2021. S&P 500 futures remain firm.
data.description: The latest data shows a notable decrease in the core Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rate, marking its lowest point since the beginning of 2021. This decrease has brought the CPI inflation rate to a nearly five-year low. In response to this news, S&P 500 futures have remained steady and firm.

data.title: RH-ISAC names keynote speakers for 2026 Cybersecurity Summit in Austin, including reps from Target and Walmart.
data.description: The upcoming April event in Austin will feature keynote speakers from major retailers Target and Walmart, as well as prominent figures in the industry. The Retail & Hospitality Information Sharing and Analysis Center (RH-ISAC) based in Vienna, Virginia revealed the lineup for their annual event set for Feb. 13, 2026. The event will showcase leaders from these influential companies discussing key insights and strategies.

data.title: Eventide Communications names Interaction Insight Corporation top reseller for 6th year in a row. Highest sales in 2025.
data.description: In a recent announcement on February 13, 2026, Eventide Communications revealed that Interaction Insight Corporation (IIC) has secured the top position as its main reseller for the sixth year running. This achievement follows a successful year in 2025 where Interaction Insight showcased the highest sales figures yet again, demonstrating outstanding performance in delivering its services.
